summary: Exploring Arctic defense agreements of the past, we propose establishing a new NATO JFC and dissolving NORAD to enhance future Arctic Defense. The post An Evolution in Arctic Collective Defense appeared first on The Arctic Institute - Center for Circumpolar Security Studies .

title: Alaska SBDC Announces Major Grant from Wells Fargo to Support Rural Economic  Growth and AI Innovation
summary: The Alaska Small Business Development Center (Alaska SBDC) is excited to announce a generous $20,000 grant from Wells Fargo aimed at a shared vision of fostering economic growth and advancing technological innovation in Alaska’s rural communities. This funding will enable the Alaska SBDC to enhance its programs and services, focusing on integrating artificial intelligence (AI) to increase the competitiveness of rural smal...

title: Chugach Commercial Holdings strengthens industrial services presence with two Fairbanks acquisitions
summary: Chugach Alaska Corporation (Chugach) subsidiary Chugach Commercial Holdings (CCH) announces the acquisition of H.V.A.C., LLC (HVAC) and Alaska Integrated Services, LLC (AIS), two leading mechanical contracting companies based in Fairbanks, Alaska.
